name: @liberia-locker/kms
description: RFP #11 — key-management abstraction for the Liberia National Digital Document Locker Platform. Wraps HashiCorp Vault's Transit secrets engine: app code only ever calls kms.encrypt/decrypt(payload, tier), never sees raw keys. Implements envelope encryption per sensitivity tier, per-record cryptographic erasure (crypto-shredding), and the documented Shamir's Secret Sharing unseal-key handover mechanism for production launch.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
